title: fragariastrum micranthum
intro: Fragariastrum micranthum is a plant species commonly known as the lesser strawberry, a perennial herb that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). Traditionally, Fragariastrum micranthum has been used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been shown to have potential health benefits. The plant's extracts have been used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions, and it is also believed to have immune-boosting properties. Fragariastrum micranthum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
